data.title: Western & Southern Financial Group Acquires Till Financial, Expanding into Digital Family Banking Services and Investing in the Next Generation
data.description: On April 27, 2026, in Cincinnati, Western & Southern Financial Group reported the acquisition of Till Financial, a fintech platform. Western & Southern Financial Group serves over six million customers with insurance, retirement, and investment solutions.

data.title: Ameresco Releases 2025 Impact Report, Highlighting Progress Across People, Planet, and Policy
data.description: A recent report by Ameresco, based in Framingham, Massachusetts, showcases their performance and advancements in three key impact areas - People, Planet, and Policy. The Ameresco 2025 Impact Report reveals important progress and achievements in these pillars.

data.title: Herndon Career Center and Blue Valley West High School Named Champions of National High School Culinary and Restaurant Management Competition
data.description: The champions emerged victorious at the 2026 National ProStart Invitational in Baltimore, beating out teams from 47 states and D.C. The intense competition culminated in the Herndon Career Center culinary team from Raytown, MO, and the Blue Valley West High School rising to the top.

data.title: Post Durnell Argument Scenario Statements – Attributable to Monsanto
data.description: In Leverkusen, Germany and St. Louis, a recent Court decision received appreciation for its examination of FIFRA’s Uniformity language and the application of its federal preemption provision to state-mandated label warnings. The U.S. Government and the Company presented compelling arguments indicating that state-imposed warning claims that deviate from EPA-approved FIFRA labels, such as in the case of Durnell, are preempted. This move is crucial to prevent the emergence of 50 distinct warning labels, thus ensuring uniformity in regulations.

data.title: Study shows 3.5% of users influence prediction market accuracy, posing fairness and insider trading concerns.
data.description: Recent study findings show that a small group of well-informed individuals significantly influences the accuracy of pricing in prediction markets. This revelation has sparked concerns regarding the fairness of these markets and the potential for insider trading. The research highlights the impact of this "informed minority" on market outcomes, emphasizing the importance of addressing issues related to market manipulation and unequal access to information. These findings shed light on the need for regulatory measures to ensure transparency and fairness in prediction markets, where a select few can wield considerable influence over outcomes. This study underscores the significance of addressing such concerns to protect the integrity of these markets and prevent potential exploitation.

data.title: Senator Tillis now supports Kevin Warsh for Fed chair after DOJ closes Powell probe. Senate to vote on April 29.
data.description: Senator Thom Tillis has decided to stop opposing the confirmation of Kevin Warsh as the Fed chair after the Department of Justice closed its investigation on Powell. A Senate vote on Warsh's confirmation is scheduled for April 29.

data.title: Halmont Properties Corporation Year End Results
data.description: Halmont Properties Corporation (TSX-V: HMT) based in Toronto revealed a net income of $19.60 million for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2025. This marks an increase from the previous year's net income of $18.40 million, which was recorded for the fiscal year ending on December 31, 2024.

data.title: New Florida Poly research targets root cause of Florida's algae crisis
data.description: In Lakeland, Florida on April 27, 2026, reports indicate that harmful algae blooms in the state's water bodies, including rivers, lakes, and springs, are endangering public health, drinking water safety, tourism, and the economy. A researcher from Florida Polytechnic University is making strides in developing a novel method to address this issue. This breakthrough aims to mitigate the harmful impact of algae blooms on various fronts, with potential significant implications for the community.

data.title: Mistral Inc. Awarded U.S. Army Contract to Provide THOR Group 2 UAS Systems in Support of Company-Level Small UAS Needs
data.description: In Bethesda, Maryland on April 27, 2026, Mistral Inc., along with their Autonomous Systems partner, FUSE (formerly Flying Production) - a subsidiary of Elbit Systems C4I & Cyber, have announced plans to provide a backpack-portable VTOL platform. This platform is designed for rapid deployment and is suitable for multi-mission operations at the company level. The collaboration aims to deliver a versatile solution for on-the-go operations.

data.title: Life Time Sea Otter Classic Showcases How Sport, Community and Industry Come Together
data.description: A festival spanning four days showcased Life Time's dedication to promoting healthy, active lifestyles regardless of the preferred activity. Taking place in Monterey, California from April 16-19, 2026, Life Time (NYSE: LTH), known as a leading healthy lifestyle brand in the nation, organized the event at Laguna Seca Raceway.

data.title: Brother-Duo Brings Pet Supplies Plus to North Massapequa, Creating Jobs and a Go-To Hub for Local Pet Owners
data.description: New Pet Supplies Plus in North Massapequa, NY, unveiled its latest store on April 24, 2026, located at 806 Hicksville Rd. Promising the best prices, selection, and service, this new location is set to cater to pet parents in the region.

data.title: Jumio Announces Mark Lorion as Chief Executive Officer
data.description: In Sunnyvale, California, Jumio, a top provider of AI-powered identity intelligence, has named Mark Lorion as the new chief executive officer. Lorion is taking over from Bala Kumar, who had been serving as president and interim CEO since the beginning of 2026. Kumar will remain in leadership roles as president and chief product & technology officer. The change comes as identity verification transitions from one-time verifications to continuous identity intelligence.
